subcodes.first_line: O thou exalted branch of the Blessed Tree! I am deeply grieved by the trials and tribulations that have befallen thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره المبارکه از جهت بلایاء و مشقات آن جناب نهایت تاثر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
